result.stdout:
Usage: files [options] [paths...]

Find files by name, size, date, type, and content.

Options:
  --text               Only text files
  --binary             Only binary files
  -L, --follow         Follow symlinks
  --absolute           Output absolute paths
  --no-hidden          Skip hidden files and directories
  --gitignore          Respect .gitignore rules
  -i, --ignore-case    Case-insensitive matching
  --case-sensitive     Case-sensitive matching
  -l, --long           Tab-delimited detail output
  -0, --print0         Null-delimited output
  --ndjson             Streaming NDJSON output
  -t, --type TYPE      f (file), d (directory), or l (symlink)
  --min-size SIZE      Minimum file size (e.g. 100k, 10M)
  --max-size SIZE      Maximum file size (e.g. 100k, 10M)
  --newer DURATION     Modified within duration (e.g. 1h, 7d)
  --older DURATION     Modified before duration (e.g. 1h, 7d)
  -d, --max-depth N    Maximum directory depth
  -g, --glob PATTERN   Match filenames against glob (repeatable)
  -e, --regex PATTERN  Match filenames against regex (repeatable)
  --ext EXT            Match file extension (repeatable)
  -h, --help           Show help
  --version            Show version
  --color              Force colored output
  --no-color           Disable colored output
  --json               JSON output to stderr
  --describe           Structured JSON metadata for AI agents

Exit Codes:
  0    Success
  1    Runtime error
  125  Usage error
